purpose: Damn Vulnerable Web Application (DVWA) is designed to help security professionals test their skills and tools in a legal environment.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Main documentation file providing an overview and installation instructions.

key_files.name: config/config.inc.php.dist
key_files.role: Template configuration file for database settings.

concerns: The application contains both documented and undocumented vulnerabilities.
Warning against deploying DVWA on public servers due to security risks.
No automated tests are mentioned in the documentation.
The README files are available in multiple languages, but not all may be up to date.
The installation process requires manual configuration of the database.

purpose: This branch focuses on handling and managing security vulnerabilities, including cryptography and token validation processes.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for building and running the application.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview of the project, installation instructions, and usage guidelines.

key_files.name: .htaccess
key_files.role: Configures URL rewriting for API requests.

key_files.name: bootstrap.php
key_files.role: Bootstraps the application by loading dependencies.

key_files.name: index.php
key_files.role: Handles cryptography vulnerability page and logic.

key_files.name: check_token_high.php
key_files.role: Processes token validation for high security level.

concerns: No tests are defined in the project structure.
The .htaccess file may expose the application to URL manipulation if not properly secured.
The check_token_high.php file does not validate the JSON structure of the input.
Potential security risks if the token_library_high.php is not properly implemented.
The README.md file may need updates to reflect the latest features.

purpose: This branch contains the core setup and miscellaneous files for the DVWA project, including configuration, styling, and PHP includes for web application functionality.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project dependencies, scripts, and metadata.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview and documentation for the project.

key_files.name: .gitignore
key_files.role: Specifies files and directories to be ignored by Git.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Contains the licensing information for the project.

key_files.name: css/help.css
key_files.role: Styles for help page

key_files.name: css/login.css
key_files.role: Styles for login page

key_files.name: includes/dvwaPage.inc.php
key_files.role: PHP includes for DVWA page structure

key_files.name: includes/Parsedown.php
key_files.role: Markdown parser for rendering text

concerns: No tests are defined in the project.
The README.md file may need updates for clarity.
Potential security issues with session management in dvwaPage.inc.php.
Parsedown.php lacks version control in the repository.
The package.json file has outdated dependencies.

purpose: Houses GitHub-specific configurations including CI/CD workflows and issue templates to streamline project management and automation.

key_files.name: workflows/codeql-analysis.yml
key_files.role: Configures CodeQL analysis for code quality and security.

key_files.name: workflows/docker-image.yml
key_files.role: Defines CI process for building and pushing Docker images.

key_files.name: ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report---installation.md
key_files.role: Template for reporting installation-related bugs.

key_files.name: ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report---vulnerability.md
key_files.role: Template for reporting vulnerabilities.

concerns: No tests are defined for the workflows.
The CodeQL analysis workflow may need customization for specific project needs.
Issue templates lack examples for better user guidance.
Potential for outdated dependencies in GitHub actions.
No validation for the fields in issue templates.

purpose: This branch contains configuration files and metadata essential for setting up and managing the database component of the project.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Defines project dependencies, scripts, and metadata.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview and documentation for the project.

key_files.name: .gitignore
key_files.role: Specifies files and directories to be ignored by Git.

key_files.name: LICENSE
key_files.role: Contains the licensing information for the project.

concerns: No tests are defined in the project.
The README.md may need updates to reflect the latest changes.
The package.json lacks detailed descriptions for some scripts.

purpose: Contains test scripts, configuration files, documentation, and external libraries for the project.

key_files.name: tests/test_url.py
key_files.role: Test script to check the validity of URLs in PHP files.

key_files.name: config/config.inc.php.dist
key_files.role: Configuration template for database and security settings.

key_files.name: docs/pdf.html
key_files.role: Documentation link for the project.

key_files.name: external/recaptcha/recaptchalib.php
key_files.role: Library for integrating Google reCAPTCHA.

concerns: Test script has TODO comments indicating areas for improvement.
Configuration file contains sensitive information that should not be hardcoded.
Documentation link points to an external PDF that may become outdated.
External library for reCAPTCHA may require updates for compatibility with future PHP versions.
Test script does not have a dedicated test suite or framework setup.
